hard_stops.logic: project information is required before warranty tracking can proceed
statute of repose deadline is within 90 days — legal exposure must be addressed immediately
one or more critical defects remain open — life safety or structural issue must be resolved

soft_flags.logic: one or more warranties expire within 60 days — schedule inspections and file claims
open warranty claims require follow-up with subcontractors or manufacturers
scheduled warranty walkthrough is overdue — delays may forfeit claim eligibility
warranty reserve is below 20% — insufficient funds to cover remaining defect remediation
